dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They say everyone has a guardian angel. Mine must be on permanent vacation, sipping margaritas in some celestial resort, completely oblivious to the chaos that is my life.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Another Monday. Another chance for the universe to play its cruelest jokes on Joo Hwa-yeon. First, my alarm didn't go off. Then, my toast decided to commit arson. And don't even get me started on the coffee.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: Just breathe, Hwa-yeon. Today is different. Today is the day. The interview for 'Starlight Media'! My dream job. Nothing can go wrong.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUMBLE (distant thunder)

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Oh, come on! It was perfectly sunny five minutes ago!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SPLASH! (a puddle of water)

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: AAH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A rogue puddle, a speeding taxi, and my pristine white blouse. A classic Hwa-yeon trifecta.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) No, no, no! This can't be happening! Not today!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! (a heavy object falling)

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: My portfolio!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As I scrambled to pick up the scattered papers, a shadow fell over me. A tall, impeccably dressed shadow.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Do-jin
dialogue.line: Having a rough morning?

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) That voice! Smooth as silk, but laced with… amusement? I looked up, and my breath hitched. He was impossibly handsome. Like he’d walked straight out of a webtoon. And he was holding my most important document, completely unharmed.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: Uh, yes. You could say that. Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Do-jin
dialogue.line: You dropped this. It seems important.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He handed me the document, his fingers brushing mine. A strange jolt, like static electricity, shot through me. My heart did a weird flutter-skip thing.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: It… it is. It's for an interview.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Do-jin
dialogue.line: Starlight Media, I presume?

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) How did he know?! He must have seen the logo. Still, it felt… unsettlingly precise.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: Yes. How did you…?

dialogue.speaker: Kang Do-jin
dialogue.line: I'm heading that way myself. Perhaps our paths are aligned.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Aligned? Or catastrophically intertwined? My bad luck radar was blaring. This man was too perfect, too calm, too… coincidental.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DRIP, DRIP (rain starting)

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: Oh, great. Now it's raining.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Do-jin
dialogue.line: Here.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He opened a sleek, black umbrella, shielding both of us from the sudden downpour. For a moment, I felt a strange sense of calm. A tiny, fleeting bubble of good fortune.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Do-jin
dialogue.line: No need. We're going the same way.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: We walked in silence for a few blocks, the rain pattering around us. His presence was… overwhelming. I couldn't shake the feeling that something significant had just happened. Or was about to.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) He saved my portfolio, sheltered me from the rain… is this what good luck feels like? After years of dating disasters, job rejections, and general cosmic mischief, could this be a turning point? Or is he just a really handsome harbinger of even worse woe?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: HONK! (a car horn blares loudly)

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A delivery scooter swerved dangerously close, nearly clipping the umbrella and sending a fresh wave of dirty water onto my already ruined blouse.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Nope. Still me. Still cursed. And now I’m walking under an umbrella with a stranger who probably thinks I’m a walking disaster zone. Is he my fortune, or is he just another chapter in my book of woe?

dialogue.speaker: Kang Do-jin
dialogue.line: Careful. Some people are in too much of a hurry.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He glanced at me, a faint, almost imperceptible smile playing on his lips. And for the first time, I noticed the small, intricate silver charm hanging from his wrist. It looked like a tiny, stylized four-leaf clover.

dialogue.speaker: Joo Hwa-yeon
dialogue.line: (Thought) A four-leaf clover? Is he mocking me? Or is it… a sign? This day just got a whole lot more complicated.

summary: Joo Hwa-yeon, plagued by her usual bad luck, faces a disastrous morning before a crucial job interview. She encounters the enigmatic Kang Do-jin, who offers unexpected help, leaving her to wonder if he's a sign of fortune or another harbinger of woe.
